title: NBRC – Research Associate-I – 1 Posts
shortInfo: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Associate-I. Candidates with Ph.D/MD Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NBRC official website.

basic_details.job_title: NBRC Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Brain Research Centre (NBRC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Associate-I. Candidates with Ph.D/MD Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through NBRC official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D/MD or equivalent degree with at least one research article published in a reputed and indexed journal.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBRC Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
